description: Quality regression baseline for production validation

overall_dense_cosine.description: Minimum acceptable cosine similarity for dense compressed KV

overall_sparse_cosine.description: Minimum acceptable cosine similarity for sparse compressed KV

category_dense_cosine.description: Minimum acceptable cosine similarity per category (dense)

category_sparse_cosine.description: Minimum acceptable cosine similarity per category (sparse)

perplexity_delta.description: Maximum acceptable perplexity increase vs baseline

top1_match_rate.description: Minimum top-1 token match rate vs baseline

reasoning.notes: Reasoning tasks require high quality to maintain logical coherence

coding.notes: Coding tasks are sensitive to small quality degradation

chat.notes: Chat tasks can tolerate moderate quality loss

long_context.notes: Long-context tasks test compression over extended sequences

regression_policy.description: When strict_mode is true, any threshold breach fails the validation. When false, warnings are issued but validation passes.

phi-3-mini.notes: Phi-3 Mini is smaller but capable
